name: CLEAN SLATE BK GROUP P.C.
description_short: Clean Slate BK Group P.C. is a bankruptcy filing service helping individuals discharge credit card and personal debt through Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 bankruptcies with affordable fees and expedited processing.
description_long:
Clean Slate BK Group P.C. operates as a bankruptcy filing service designed to help consumers navigate the bankruptcy process with minimal friction. The company positions itself as a guide through a difficult financial decision, emphasizing that bankruptcy can provide emotional and financial relief through a fresh start. Founded on the principle that the filing process should be straightforward rather than overwhelming, they serve individuals carrying unsustainable credit card and personal debt loads.

The company offers comprehensive bankruptcy filing services including free initial consultations, intake interviews, document preparation, attorney representation, and guidance through the entire discharge process. They advertise filing for as little as $500 upfront, claim to complete filings within 2 weeks of document submission, and promise discharge completion within approximately 3 months. Case managers are assigned to guide clients through each step, and the company emphasizes transparency about fees—positioning "no hidden fees" as a competitive advantage. They also bundle required bankruptcy counseling and education courses into their service offerings.

Clean Slate distinguishes itself through speed of processing, accessibility via phone consultation, and what client testimonials consistently highlight as emotional support during a vulnerable financial period. Staff members including intake representatives (Dia, Brooke), case managers (Anthony DiGiorno, Lahna), and the attorney (Mr. Rothman) are named in reviews. The company emphasizes non-judgmental service and prompt communication, with clients noting rapid response times to questions via phone and email. Their marketing focuses on removing the shame and fear associated with bankruptcy filing.

However, prospective clients should understand that bankruptcy has serious long-term credit consequences despite its debt-relief benefits. While the company provides fast filing and supportive service, bankruptcy remains a significant financial decision with 7-10 year reporting periods on credit records. The testimonials are uniformly positive and recent (all dated Feb-Mar 2026), which may not reflect the full range of client experiences. Clients must also actively participate by submitting requested documents promptly for the promised timeline to materialize.
address: 7 Pennsylvania Plaza Ste 601, New York, NY 10001

company_info.headquarters: 7 Pennsylvania Plaza Ste 601, New York, NY 10001

pros: Low upfront cost: only $500 needed to file according to website
Fast processing: claims filings ready within 2 weeks of document submission
Quick discharge timeline: testimonials report discharge completion in approximately 3 months
No hidden fees: explicitly advertises all-inclusive pricing with no surprise costs
Free initial consultation with no obligation
Assigned case managers for personalized guidance throughout the process
Named staff members (attorneys, case managers, intake reps) suggest accountability and established team
cons: Bankruptcy remains on credit reports for 7-10 years despite filing service; this company does not repair the underlying credit damage
All testimonials are recent (Feb-Mar 2026) and uniformly positive, limiting visibility into potential negative experiences or service failures
Processing timeline depends on client responsiveness; slow document submission could extend the quoted 2-week and 3-month timelines
No information provided about which bankruptcy chapters they handle, eligibility requirements, or debt thresholds
Limited details on the scope of services (e.g., whether they handle complex cases, multiple creditors, or business bankruptcy)
best_for: Individuals with significant credit card and personal debt seeking a fresh financial start through bankruptcy
First-time bankruptcy filers who need emotional support and clear guidance through an unfamiliar legal process
Consumers prioritizing speed and affordability in filing over complex legal strategy
diagnosis: Clean Slate BK Group P.C. is best for individuals overwhelmed by unsecured debt (primarily credit cards and personal loans) who need to file bankruptcy and value speed, transparency, and emotional support over complex legal strategy. The main caveat is that bankruptcy is a serious financial tool with 7-10 year credit record consequences—this company facilitates the filing process efficiently but does not eliminate the long-term impact on creditworthiness.
services: Required bankruptcy counseling and education course facilitation
Phone and email support throughout the process
